caption: A man is seated in a studio setting, wearing a white button-down shirt, a patterned bow tie, cream-colored suspenders, round glasses, and over-ear headphones. He is topped with a distinctive, tall, greyish-blonde wig. He is positioned in front of a black microphone, and his mouth is open as if speaking. In the background, a framed image of a gold shield is on the wall, and a sign reads "UNIQUE FASHIONS." On-screen text overlays the image, including a logo that says "#REALTALK PODCAST" on the left and the text "REAL TALK 101" on the right. Across the frames, the man remains in a static position, with only slight movements of his mouth and head as he continues to speak into the microphone. The background, equipment, and on-screen graphics remain constant throughout the sequence.
